message:
chore: sync beads issue tracker state — MOR/C1.4 revocation SLA tasks

Sync the local beads issue tracker with new issues and status updates
created during the Modes of Reasoning analysis session (2026-04-08).

New issues added:
- flywheel_connectors-08dl2: Zone-wide revocation SLA with quorum-signed
  frontier (labels: mesh, revocation, security)
- flywheel_connectors-70qcc, -800e3, -8s56e: Supporting dependency tasks
  for the revocation freshness SLA implementation

These issues capture the F7 Systems finding that revocation issuance-to-
enforcement delay is unbounded, and define tasks to add
revocation_freshness_sla_secs to ZoneCheckpoint with quorum-signed
enforcement.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
